Opcode.name: PCM_OP_PYMT_PROCESS_SEPA_RESPONSE
Opcode.Doc: Processes the response recevied from the bank for the sepa request

Int.name: PIN_FLD_BATCH_TYPE
Int.Doc: Type of the sepa request whose response is being processed. Possible values are: 1 - SDD Request, 2 - SCT Request.

String.name: PIN_FLD_MSG_ID
String.Doc: Unique Id of the sepa request file, which is rejected by the bank. This field will be ignored if PYMT_INFO array is passed.

String.name: PIN_FLD_REASON_CODE
String.Doc: Code of the reason due to which bank rejected the sepa request. This field will be ignored if PYMT_INFO array is passed.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_PYMT_INFO
Array.Doc: List of payment information identifiers and transactions which are rejected by the bank.

String.name: PIN_FLD_PYMT_INFO_ID
String.Doc: Unique Id of the payment information, which is rejected by the bank. This field will be ignored if TRANSACTIONS array is passed.

String.name: PIN_FLD_REASON_CODE
String.Doc: Code of the reason due to which bank rejected the sepa request. This field will be ignored if TRANSACTIONS array is passed.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_TRANSACTIONS
Array.Doc: List of transaction identifiers which are rejected.

String.name: PIN_FLD_TRANS_ID
String.Doc: Unique Id of the transaction, which is rejected by the bank.

String.name: PIN_FLD_REASON_CODE
String.Doc: Code of the reason due to which bank rejected the sepa request.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Enum.name: PIN_FLD_RESULT
Enum.Doc:
Specifies whether the processing completed successfully or not Possible values:
0 - Processing of the rejected sepa request Failed
1 - Processing of the rejected sepa request Passed

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
